item.title: 🍿 Watched Nobody (2021) ⚠️ SPOILER WARNI...
item.description: 🍿 Watched Nobody (2021) ⚠️ SPOILER WARNING: MILD SPOILERS My Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐ (4/5 stars) Highly, highly unbelievable yet very entertaining. Great cast. If you want to kill about two hours and are after a fun, fast-paced movie, https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/04/26/watched-nobody/

item.title: Windows passwordless sign-in is a strong...
item.description: Windows passwordless sign-in is a strong security goal, but Microsoft isn't done yet. Hello, PIN, and passkeys work for login, but Task Schd, RDP, services, & network creds still need passwords. Passwordless shouldn't cause legacy Windows features to break unexpectedly ⚠️. #SelfHosting #Microsoft

item.title: Loura's Website Magic If you ever want t...
item.description: Loura's Website Magic If you ever want to see a master craftswoman at website design and theming, then you must stop over at Hey Loura! She is also in my BlogRoll. Her latest creation is spectacular and pirate-themed. She https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/04/23/louras-website-magic/

item.title: Memes Connect Us, I Guess I usually watc...
item.description: Memes Connect Us, I Guess I usually watch BGT (Britain's Got Talent) clips on YouTube because the British often have really interesting acts. One I liked was the Glantaf Boys Choir from Wales. They were excellent, and it made https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/04/21/memes-connect-us-i-guess/

item.title: Framework almost gave me a heart attack ...
item.description: Framework almost gave me a heart attack 😱 (Framework AI). That felt more like an April Fools' joke 🤡. #Framework #Selfhosting #Tech

item.title: Gave my Zola blog a proper home, https:/...
item.description: Gave my Zola blog a proper home, https://michaelreflects.com. Much better than a .https://pages.dev URL. 🤓. It's been given a modern facelift too. Stop by and let me know what you think.

item.title: Good way to begin the morning ☀️. It’s g...
item.description: Good way to begin the morning ☀️. It’s going to be a hot one, though 🔥.

item.title: We just had a power outage again ⚡. I ne...
item.description: We just had a power outage again ⚡. I need another UPS because the one I have can’t handle everything 🔋. I want a dedicated UPS for the mini PC running the Plex server 💻🎥. This is the second time it’s happened this week 😓. #PowerOutage #SelfHosting

item.title: I’ve resubscribed to ChatGPT, and Codex ...
item.description: I’ve resubscribed to ChatGPT, and Codex is actually pretty good. I’m using it more with Clairvoyance (from Star Dock) now that Claude has ridiculously low usage limits😤.

item.title: Back to work tomorrow 😩, but it feels li...
item.description: Back to work tomorrow 😩, but it feels like my vacation just started 🌴. I really don’t want to go back... 😞

item.title: Moon Views, Earth Love I have been watch...
item.description: Moon Views, Earth Love I have been watching the Artemis II mission off and on. I saw these pictures on the NASA website, and here are a few that I really like. They definitely got me thinking. I have always been fascinated https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/04/07/moon-views-earth-love/

item.title: You know what I hate? 😠 When a company k...
item.description: You know what I hate? 😠 When a company knows their product is defective but doesn’t proactively fix it or offer a replacement. The Logitech G703 Lightspeed is about to be tossed 🖱️💥. The left button won’t stay engaged for dragging, and apparently, that’s a known issue. 😤 #TechTroubles #Logitech

item.title: Birthday Thoughts on a Country at a Cros...
item.description: Birthday Thoughts on a Country at a Crossroads I turn 57 this month, and with everything going on in the world, it almost feels like an afterthought. This year feels worse, more doom and gloom than others. I am not entirely sure https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/04/06/birthday-thoughts-on-a-country/

item.title: Well, how about this ☀️, the sun is shin...
item.description: Well, how about this ☀️, the sun is shining, and it's raining at the same time 🌧️. #Florida #NatureMagic

item.description: 🍿Watched Civil War (2024) ⚠️ SPOILER WARNING: FULL SPOILERS My Rating: ½ (0.5/5 stars) The movie stunk, and it stunk so bad I kept watching only for the action at the end.
